prompt: Generate comprehensive API documentation for this Express.js user management API. The codebase has CRUD endpoints for users at /api/users with GET (list + single), POST (create), PUT (update), and DELETE (remove). Each endpoint uses express-validator for input validation. Document all endpoints with parameters, request/response schemas, and examples. Output both a Markdown reference doc and an OpenAPI 3.0 JSON spec.
assertions: Documentation includes all four HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE
Each endpoint has a human-readable description explaining what it does
Path parameters (e.g., :id) are documented with their type and constraints
Query parameters for the list endpoint (page, limit) are documented with defaults
POST and PUT endpoints have request body schemas with field types and validation rules
Each endpoint includes at least one response example with realistic JSON data
Error responses are documented with status codes (400, 404, 409, 422) and response bodies
An OpenAPI 3.0 JSON spec is produced with valid paths and component schemas
